channel.title: Sponsors on The Daily Thrum
channel.description: Recent content in Sponsors on The Daily Thrum

item.title: SponsorBuster Lets You Skip The Part Where A Man Pretending To Investigate Something Sells You A VPN
item.description:
Do you mostly listen to YouTube in the background now, because Spotify increased its subscription fee?

Are you tired of hearing a man spend forty-seven minutes explaining how society is collapsing, only to pause halfway through and tell you that the real threat to civilisation is browsing the internet without military-grade encryption while buying socks?

Have you ever found yourself washing dishes while some bloke with a ring light says, “And that’s why I started using…” before your whole body tightens with the terrible knowledge that you are about to be sold a VPN, a meal kit, a learning platform, a deodorant, a productivity app, or an online therapy platform by someone whose main qualification is owning a microphone?
